title: puccinellia palustris subsp. jeholensis
intro: Puccinellia palustris subsp. jeholensis, also known as the Jehol saltwort, is a type of plant that belongs to the grass family and is native to certain regions of China and Korea. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant capabilities, making it useful in treating various health issues. The Jehol saltwort is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Puccinellia palustris subsp. jeholensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various ailments.
